episodes.title: Home on the Range
episodes.description: Stand-up comedian Deb Okafor inherits her uncle's failing dairy farm and has to figure out cows.

episodes.title: The Learning Curve
episodes.description: Deb's first milking session goes about as well as expected — which is very badly.

episodes.title: Neighbors
episodes.description: The neighboring farms have opinions about Deb and her urban approach to rural life.

episodes.title: The Fair
episodes.description: The county fair is a proving ground. Deb enters a cow. The cow has other plans.

episodes.title: Hired Help
episodes.description: Deb's childhood best friend drives out to help — and immediately makes everything harder.

episodes.title: Cash Flow
episodes.description: An unexpected vet bill forces Deb to think about what the farm actually produces.

episodes.title: Open Mic Night
episodes.description: Deb attempts to bring comedy to the local bar — the crowd is skeptical.

episodes.title: Mud Season Again
episodes.description: Spring on a working farm involves more mud than Deb anticipated from literally anyone.

episodes.title: The Audition
episodes.description: A TV producer comes to the area looking for 'authentic rural content.' Chaos ensues.

episodes.title: One Year
episodes.description: Deb reaches the one-year mark on the farm — and has to decide what comes next.

episodes.title: The Expansion
episodes.description: Deb decides to diversify — artisanal cheese, obviously. What could go wrong?

episodes.title: The Cheese Cave
episodes.description: Converting the old root cellar into a proper aging room leads to structural discoveries.

episodes.title: Competition
episodes.description: A rival farmstead cheese operation moves into the county with better equipment and a marketing budget.

episodes.title: The Farmers' Market
episodes.description: Deb's first table at the market — hand-lettered signs, questionable branding, surprising results.

episodes.title: Celebrity Endorsement
episodes.description: A local celebrity promotes Deb's cheese online. The internet has a lot of opinions.

episodes.title: Supply Chain
episodes.description: The cow that started it all is sick. Everything stops until she isn't.

episodes.title: The Deal
episodes.description: A restaurant in the city wants to put the cheese on their menu — Deb has to decide if she can scale.

episodes.title: The Herd
episodes.description: A new calf is born on the farm. Deb handles it about as emotionally as you'd expect.

extras.title: Deb's Real Farm Training
extras.description: Behind the scenes: the actual farm training the lead actress underwent.

extras.title: The Cows of Laughing Stock
extras.description: Meet the bovine cast and their trainers.
